items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Different hours per location'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Different hours per location', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the specific hours for each location. While the use case mentions that Dr. Williams works on different days at different locations, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the actual hours of operation for each location. This indicates a gap in the evidence related to the specific requirement being tested.
